metadata.description: A single-plugin marketplace for generate-walkthrough — forensic, source-verified HTML codebase walkthroughs.

plugins.name: generate-walkthrough
plugins.description: Turns any codebase into a single self-contained HTML walkthrough — a forensic, source-verified, screen-by-screen trace grounded in real file:line evidence. Also derives an OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec and a Postman collection from the walkthrough sidecar.
